settings.title: A Morning With the Pawlish Groomers
settings.excerpt: Reading a nervous dog is half the skill, and it is the half no clipper or shampoo can do for you.
settings.body:
People assume grooming is mostly about scissors. Most of our morning is actually about reading dogs.

Our groomer Nadia can tell within a minute whether a dog needs a brisk, confident approach or a slow, quiet one. Get that wrong and even a simple nail trim becomes a wrestling match neither of us enjoys.

Our other half of the team, Ben, has the steadiest hands for the fiddly work around the eyes and feet, and an endless supply of patience for the wrigglers.

We keep the music low and the dryers gentle on purpose. A calm room makes for a calm dog, and a calm dog gets a far better haircut.
